---
title: "Tech Blog"
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  contents: "posts"
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  categories: true
page-layout: full
---

For deeper insights and weekly reflections on AI engineering, subscribe to [**The Conductor**](https://conductorbyam.substack.com/) — my newsletter for engineers learning to lead AI without losing the depth that makes their judgment irreplaceable.
